_meta.description: WorkHive walkthrough finding registry. Every surface-level issue found during any walkthrough (manual or automated) lives here. L13 blocks push until every finding with severity >= medium has has_test=true OR has_validator=true.

schema.session: ISO date when finding was first observed
schema.domain: which of the 9 Sentinel Agent domains owns this
schema.has_test: true if a journey spec covers this class of bug
schema.test_file: the spec file that covers it (null if none)
schema.has_validator: true if a Sentinel Agent layer gates it
schema.validator_layer: e.g. L10, L11, L12 (null if none)
schema.fix_commit: git commit hash when fixed (null if not yet)

findings.issue: Card 3 'Open Issues' showed 0 despite 18 open work orders visible in stat-open. The renderer only read PM overdue â€” ignoring open WOs and low stock.
findings.root_cause: loadSupervisorSummary() only consumed v_pm_compliance_truth. v_logbook_truth and v_inventory_items_truth were declared in the source chip but never read by the renderer.
findings.test_file: tests/journey-hive.spec.ts â€” 'Open Issues card is NEVER 0 when stat-open shows work orders'

findings.issue: Plain-Read verdict block was below Stair card and Stats row â€” engineering data appeared before the 5-second read, burying the verdict.
findings.root_cause: Supervisor summary block was in HTML after #maturity-stairway-card. DOM order determined visual order.
findings.test_file: tests/journey-hive.spec.ts â€” 'supervisor sees the Plain-Read summary block'

findings.issue: Today's Brief panel showed 'No AI analysis yet. Reports generate automatically on schedule.' when no AI reports existed â€” wasting vertical space and looking broken.
findings.root_cause: loadTodaysBrief() always un-hid the panel, even with empty bullets. SessionStorage cache also poisoned the empty state.
findings.test_file: tests/journey-hive.spec.ts â€” 'Today's Brief panel stays hidden when no AI reports exist'

findings.issue: Network Benchmark showed 'General: 0.5d MTBF / Not enough data for network comparison yet' â€” showing the hive's own MTBF under a Benchmark header without any comparand.
findings.root_cause: loadBenchmarks() rendered all hive rows regardless of whether a network comparand existed. 'Not enough data' message appeared next to the hive's own value.
findings.test_file: tests/journey-hive.spec.ts â€” source chip + verdict tests

findings.issue: Pattern Alerts panel rendered confident pre-failure claims (Multi-Symptom BF-001, 4x Repeat MILL-001) with no source chip â€” supervisor could not audit what triggered the alert.
findings.root_cause: loadPatternAlerts() had no renderSourceChip() call. 3 of 4 detection rule formulas (escalating_frequency, multi_symptom, missed_pm) were also missing from canonical_formulas.

findings.issue: Verdict said 'Primary discipline 5 levels behind target' (red) while Card 1 said 'ON TARGET 5/5 / COMPLETE' (green) â€” direct contradiction on the same screen.
findings.root_cause: primaryGap used default target=5 for untracked primaries (PLC Programming not in DISCIPLINES). Card 1 used default target=2 and iterated only over the 5 standard DISCIPLINES. Same worker, two different computations.
findings.test_file: tests/journey-skillmatrix.spec.ts â€” 'REGRESSION: verdict and Card 1 do not contradict'

findings.issue: ReferenceError: _currentSection is not defined â€” page threw JS error on load, breaking the Plain-Read renderer.
findings.root_cause: renderMarketplaceSummary() referenced _currentSection but the state variable was named _section. Typo in variable name.

findings.issue: Identifier 'escHtml' has already been declared â€” page threw SyntaxError on load, crashing the entire script block. Source chip invisible, cards stuck on Loading.
findings.root_cause: utils.js was added to report-sender.html (to fix logPageView) but report-sender already defined escHtml inline. Duplicate declaration.
findings.test_file: tests/journey-report-sender.spec.ts â€” 'REGRESSION: no escHtml duplicate declaration'
findings.validator_layer: validate_report_sender.py â€” esc_html check (now accepts utils.js as source)

findings.issue: Card 3 tag showed 'LOW' (red) for ON TRACK compliance percentage â€” misleading label that reads as 'low risk' not 'low compliance'.
findings.root_cause: The tag string 'LOW' was ambiguous. Needed to be 'BELOW STAIR' to match the Stair-readiness ladder (STAIR-READY / BUILDING / BELOW STAIR).
findings.test_file: tests/journey-pm.spec.ts â€” 'ON TRACK card tag is STAIR-READY, BUILDING, or BELOW STAIR'

findings.issue: 10 of 16 walkthrough pages had no top-of-page source chip â€” supervisor/worker could not trace what data was being shown or when it was last refreshed.
findings.root_cause: Source chips were only added to the first 6 pages (hive, alert-hub, analytics, predictive, asset-hub, ph-intelligence) during the original Plain-Read sprint. The remaining 10 were not addressed.
findings.test_file: tests/journey-pm.spec.ts + journey-inventory + journey-skillmatrix + journey-achievements + journey-project-manager + journey-marketplace + journey-report-sender + journey-shift-brain + journey-dayplanner

findings.issue: Analytics page always showed 'Analysis failed â€” check console' when uvicorn was not running. No graceful fallback state â€” just a banner and stuck Loading cards.
findings.root_cause: Python API (uvicorn) is a separate process that must be started manually. The page has no detection of this state to show a user-friendly 'API offline' message.

findings.issue: When page 8 (shift-brain) flaked and was retried, beforeAll ran again and wiped pages 1-7 screenshots. Only pages 8-16 were captured.
findings.root_cause: beforeAll cleared all PNGs before every test group. With retries:1 in playwright.config.ts, beforeAll re-runs before the retry group.

findings.issue: Submit button and textarea were unreachable by Playwright normal click â€” 'Element is outside of the viewport' / 'locator.click: Timeout 8000ms exceeded'. Sticky nav overlay covered interactive elements.
findings.root_cause: community.html has a sticky bottom nav that covers the post form's submit button at default viewport. Normal click fails; scrollIntoViewIfNeeded + el.click() bypass required.

findings.issue: Playwright test checking for audit log entries used class selectors ([class*='entry'], .wh-card) that matched 0 elements even when 41 entries were visible. Entries are plain divs with no class.
findings.root_cause: Audit log renders entries as unstyled div children of #feed â€” no class names. Selector assumed class-based structure.
findings.test_file: tests/journey-audit-log.spec.ts â€” 'audit feed renders entries or shows empty state'

findings.issue: 'Schema compliance' label exists in DOM as class='sl' (sub-label) inside a collapsed details pane. toBeVisible() failed even though the label exists.
findings.sentinel_agent: Frontend Fidelity (UX contract â€” details toggle)
findings.root_cause: Schema compliance is inside the details pane which starts hidden. Label exists but is not visible at initial page state.
findings.test_file: tests/journey-ai-quality.spec.ts â€” 'schema compliance card renders in content'

findings.issue: Verdict text is not displayed at the top of the page
findings.root_cause: False positive: page renders Plain-Read verdict correctly. AI misidentified scroll position or header as the verdict zone.
findings._proposed_gate: Verify verdict text presence and position

findings.issue: Verdict text is missing at the top of the page
findings.root_cause: False positive: page renders Plain-Read verdict correctly. AI misidentified scroll position or header as the verdict zone.
findings._proposed_gate: Verify verdict text presence and content

findings.issue: The page is displaying an 'Honest Empty State' instead of the expected intelligence verdict and data cards.
findings.root_cause: Expected behaviour: ph-intelligence shows honest empty state when network sample < threshold. By design.
findings._proposed_gate: A state-validator that ensures the 'Intelligence' view renders the verdict and cards when the user is at Stair 3 or above.

findings.issue: Verdict text is not found at the top of the page
findings.root_cause: False positive: page renders Plain-Read verdict correctly. AI misidentified scroll position or header as the verdict zone.
findings._proposed_gate: Verify verdict text presence on page load

findings.issue: No source chip is visible below the page title
findings.root_cause: False positive: chip IS visible in screenshot (small condensed text below subtitle). AI missed it.
findings._proposed_gate: Verify source chip presence below page title

findings.issue: Cards show real numbers (0) and are settled
findings.root_cause: Low-severity AI observation -- not actionable
findings._proposed_gate: Verify card numbers and settlement status

findings.issue: No contradiction between verdict tone and card values
findings.root_cause: Low-severity AI observation -- not actionable
findings._proposed_gate: Verify verdict tone consistency with card values

findings.issue: No empty states are visible when data exists (e.g., 0 reports, 0 contacts)
findings.root_cause: Low-severity AI observation -- not actionable
findings._proposed_gate: Verify empty state handling for existing data

findings.issue: The summary cards show zero values for entries, machines, and open items, which may indicate a loading failure or empty state rather than actual data.
findings.root_cause: Expected: empty state for a hive with no logbook entries. Not a bug.
findings._proposed_gate: A validator that checks if 'cards_settled' is true before allowing the page to be considered 'ready'.

findings.issue: The search input field contains a truncated placeholder 'Search machin' instead of 'Search machine'.
findings.root_cause: Low-severity AI observation -- not actionable
findings._proposed_gate: A UI regression test or linting rule for string length and overflow in input components.

findings.issue: The verdict text at the top of the page is not found
findings.root_cause: Expected: community is a write/log surface without Plain-Read verdict contract.
findings._proposed_gate: Verify that verdict text is present and displayed correctly

findings.issue: The cards do not show real numbers, but there are no cards visible in the screenshot
findings.root_cause: Low-severity AI observation -- not actionable
findings._proposed_gate: Verify that cards display real numbers or a loading state

findings.issue: There is no source chip below the page title or below each AI/derived panel
findings.root_cause: Detected automatically by walkthrough-analyzer. Investigate before gating.
findings.validator_layer: L11 insight panel anchor â€” chip added to page init
findings._proposed_gate: Verify that source chips are present and correctly attributed

findings.issue: There is no visible contradiction between the verdict tone and the cards
findings.root_cause: Low-severity AI observation -- not actionable
findings._proposed_gate: Verify that verdict tone matches the data displayed in the cards

findings.issue: There are no visible empty states or placeholders that should be hidden when data exists
findings.root_cause: Low-severity AI observation -- not actionable
findings._proposed_gate: Verify that empty states are handled correctly and placeholders are hidden when data exists

findings.issue: No .wh-source-chip was populated on community.html â€” supervisor cannot trace data provenance
findings.root_cause: Detected automatically by walkthrough-analyzer. Investigate before gating.
findings.validator_layer: L11 insight panel anchor â€” chip added to page init
findings._proposed_gate: Add renderSourceChip() call to the page's init function and register in L11 INSIGHT_PANEL_CONTRACT

findings.issue: Page 'predictive' was captured before settling â€” waitForFunction timed out. Verdict showed: 'None'. Screenshot may show a loading state rather than real data. Investigate why chip or hero cards are slow to populate.
findings.root_cause: Auto-gated: journey spec tests\journey-predictive.spec.ts already covers this finding class. No new gate needed.
findings._proposed_gate: Add page-specific settled condition or increase timeout in walkthrough spec

_validator_decision.reason: Page predictive consistently times out â€” needs a custom settle signal

findings.issue: Journey test FAILED on hive.spec: page loads without console errors -- TimeoutError: page.waitForFunction: Timeout 8000ms exceeded.
findings.root_cause: Test 'page loads without console errors' failed: TimeoutError: page.waitForFunction: Timeout 8000ms exceeded.

_validator_decision.target_layer: fix failing test: page loads without console errors
_validator_decision.reason: Test failure regression -- fix root cause

findings.issue: Soft-skip in pm.spec journey: [journey-pm] no uncompleted scope items â€” skipping complete test
findings.root_cause: Seeder does not guarantee required data for this scenario

_validator_decision.target_layer: ensure test data for this scenario
_validator_decision.reason: Soft-skip prevents scenario from asserting: [journey-pm] no uncompleted scope items â€” skipping complete test

findings.issue: Soft-skip in shift-brain.spec journey: [journey-shift-brain] plan already exists â€” skipping generate test
findings.root_cause: DOM element or condition missing in test env

_validator_decision.reason: Soft-skip prevents scenario from asserting: [journey-shift-brain] plan already exists â€” skipping generate test

findings.issue: HIVE_ROLE used in ops-home renderTodaysOneThing() but never declared -- ReferenceError crashes script
findings.root_cause: Variable declared on hive.html but missing from index.html ops-home section

findings.issue: Flow read limits (80KB-250KB) truncate pages up to 274KB -- assertions on staging fns and WHVoice always fail
findings.root_cause: urllib.request.urlopen r.read(N) cut-off before pattern location in file

findings.issue: Logbook form submits without a machine selected (hidden #f-machine field is empty). No client-side validation fires. Entry reaches server with null machine.
findings.root_cause: Layer 2 E2E write-path test found: form advances through all 3 steps and hits Save Entry with no machine — no alert or inline error shown. Capture contract logbook_add_entry_v1 does validate server-side, so insert is blocked — but user sees no error feedback.

_validator_decision.target_layer: client-side validation: machine required before step advance
_validator_decision.reason: Layer 2 → Layer 1 feedback: write-path validation gap not caught by Layer 0

findings.issue: When the Supabase logbook edge function fails (aborted/500), the logbook shows no error message, no retry button. User sees silent failure.
findings.root_cause: Layer 2 E2E api_error scenario: route to logbook function aborted, form submitted — no toast/alert/retry rendered. The addEntry() function may swallow errors without updating UI.

_validator_decision.target_layer: error UI: addEntry() must show toast or inline error on catch
_validator_decision.reason: Layer 2 → Layer 1 feedback: API error handling gap not caught by Layer 0

findings.issue: Layer 2 E2E read-path found 0 logbook entries for the test hive after auth and hive-gate dismissal. Data load succeeded but no .entry-card elements rendered.
findings.root_cause: Test seeder does not create logbook entries for the default test hive. Layer 2 happy-path passes (WARN not FAIL) but real regression coverage requires at least 1 seeded entry.

_validator_decision.target_layer: seed 3+ logbook entries per test hive
_validator_decision.reason: Layer 2 → Layer 1 feedback: seeding gap prevents read-path happy test from asserting actual data

findings.issue: project-manager.html auto-opens #modal-wizard on page load, blocking all other button interactions including the New project button. E2E tests must force-close it via JS.
findings.root_cause: openModal('modal-wizard') is called on DOMContentLoaded or shortly after load. If the user has no projects yet, the wizard auto-launches. This is intentional UX but breaks automation and may confuse return visits.

_validator_decision.reason: Intentional UX for first-time users. Test harness dismisses via closeModal(). Acceptable WARN.
